title: Oip's Subtle Horror
description: A subtle mod to amplify the silence in each and every Minecraft world
body:
Do not expect a traditional horror mod, there are no jumpscares, ridiculous noises, excessive obscenity, or game altering additions. This mod simply fills in where curiosity ends, what all could possibly happen?

This mod adds:

Sanity Events- Certain events in game can decrease your sanity, as it gets lower, events begin to occur more often, and with higher severity. These events can happen without you even knowing, but sometimes you will hear noises or something will snuff out your torches. (there is a lot more, but in that line of thinking)

Effigies- A simple block entity to deter anything that might be lurking in the shadows. 

Sanity Debuffs- You may experience debuffs at lower insanity, These make the game slightly more challenging but more often than not, wont hurt you.

All sound design made by Glowberry! Check out their work here!

[https://modrinth.com/user/Glowberry66](https://modrinth.com/user/Glowberry66)


If you have questions, reach out to me via email or shoot me a dm on discord

OipTheCat@outlook.com
